description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that logs into the GitLab Container Registry in before_script and uses Docker runners (tag docker). Define stages build, test, deploy, release and set variables GL_DOMAIN and GL_IMAGE_NAME. In the build stage add a build:dev job that builds the image $GL_IMAGE_NAME:$GL_IMAGE_TAG (set to $CI_COMMIT_SHA) and pushes it. In the test stage add a test:dev job that pulls that image and runs npm run test inside Docker. In the deploy stage add a deploy:dev job that builds a temporary image from bin/dockerfile.kubectl, runs it with many environment variables and executes ./kubectl-inside-docker.sh $CMD_DOCKERFILE (apply for dev), plus a manual stop:dev job that runs the same script with CMD_DOCKERFILE delete. In the release stage add a manual release:production job that runs the same deploy script with CMD_DOCKERFILE apply, GL_ENV_URL pointing to the production domain, KUBE_ENV production and KUBE_NAME hello, and only runs on the master branch.
